summary: Doc Portal System Refinement testing completed. All major features verified: UI simplification (removed redundant buttons), secure messaging encryption, EU billing compliance, and i18n/localization. Fixed bug in ClientProfile.jsx where LanguageSelector was used instead of CountrySelector.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in ClientProfile.jsx line 138: Changed LanguageSelector to CountrySelector
ProviderDashboard.jsx: Invite button correctly removed from header, available in sidebar and Clients tab
ClientPortal.jsx: Footer navigation buttons correctly removed, navigation via sidebar/cards works
BusinessSettings.jsx: Country-specific compliance notes and badges (E-Invoicing, Reverse Charge) working correctly
secure_messaging.py: AES-256 encryption enabled with PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 key derivation
provider_routes.py: Dashboard stats correctly include pending_payment appointments
seed_data_creation: Created test provider and client accounts for refinement testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refinement features tested and working. CountrySelector persists to localStorage. Business Settings shows country-specific compliance notes. Secure messaging encryption is ENABLED (AES-256). Provider dashboard includes pending_payment appointments in stats.

tests_performed.business_settings_reverse_charge_badge: PASS - Reverse Charge Available badge visible for France
tests_performed.provider_dashboard_stats: PASS - Returns all required stats including upcomingAppointments
